patches.summary: Keep the FTS index accurate when a synced notice is updated.
patches.reason: External-content FTS5 tables retain old tokens unless the previous indexed row is deleted before reinsert.
patches.validated_outcome: SQLite reproduction returns oldmatch=0 and newmatch=1 after an updated notice title is reindexed.

patches.summary: Group award winners by name and country in buyer and concentration analysis.
patches.reason: SQLite grouping by winner_name alone merged distinct same-name entities and returned arbitrary winner_country values.
